message:
feat: DPO-Lite quality training + adapter-model compatibility

Part A: DPO-Lite (Quality-Aware Training)
- Add Quality enum (standard/rejection/gold_standard) to ConversationEntry
- Add markLastAsRejection() and markLastAsGoldStandard() APIs
- Update Hippocampus to filter rejections and boost gold_standard (2x weight)
- Prevents model from learning its own mistakes

Part B: Adapter-Model Compatibility ("Lock & Key")
- Add model_hash field to AdapterInfo for validation
- Add extractModelHashFromPath() helper (convention: {hash}_{name}.lora)
- Validate model hash on adapter load to prevent crash from mismatches
- Add checkModelBootstrap() for REM cycle (memory replay on new models)

Tests added for Quality serialization and model hash extraction.
